title: OutcomeSchemas
description: Schemas for outcome record shapes used by the ROI telemetry system. Grounded in crates/xiaoguai-audit/src/outcomes.rs.

OutcomeKind.title: OutcomeKind
OutcomeKind.description: The kind of outcome being attributed. Custom is the escape hatch for operator-defined categories.

OutcomeRecord.title: OutcomeRecord
OutcomeRecord.description: A single recorded outcome event. Mirrors the 'agent_outcomes' table row shape. Written by OutcomeRecorder::record().

oneOf.description: Session identifier this outcome is attributed to.

session_id.description: Session identifier. Null when not tied to a specific session.

agent_name.description: Name of the agent that produced this outcome.

kind.description: Outcome kind string. Should be one of the OutcomeKind enum values, but free-form strings are accepted for custom kinds.

value.description: Numeric magnitude of the outcome. Must be non-negative.

unit.description: Unit label for the value. Null if dimensionless.

oneOf.description: Human-readable description of what drove this outcome (e.g. 'deal closed', 'ticket resolved').

description.description: Optional free-text description of this outcome attribution.

attributed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp (RFC 3339) when the outcome was recorded.

metadata.description: Arbitrary JSON context (e.g. CRM deal ID, ticket URL). Use null when there is no extra context.

Aggregate.title: Aggregate
Aggregate.description: Aggregated view of outcomes returned by OutcomeRecorder::aggregate() and GET /v1/outcomes.

sum.description: Sum of all outcome values in the filtered set.

count.description: Number of outcome records in the filtered set.

avg.description: Average outcome value (sum / count). Zero when count is zero.

OutcomeSummary.title: OutcomeSummary
OutcomeSummary.description: Per-kind aggregated summary returned by GET /v1/outcomes/summary for the ROI dashboard.

by_kind.description: Map of outcome kind string to its Aggregate. Keys are sorted alphabetically.

kind.description: Outcome kind string for this bucket.

sum.description: Sum of all outcome values on this date for this kind.

count.description: Number of outcome records on this date for this kind.

examples.description: AR collection recovered via dunning draft
